title: Delivery Driver (Own Van)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

  • Limwood Group, established in 2018 and headquartered in Singapore, specialises in the import and distribution of gourmet Food & Beverage Products from boutique producers worldwide. Inspired by our travels, every product is personally curated by the founders of the company to reflect our care and attention to provenance and quality. From award-winning wineries, distilleries, breweries and farms, we are dedicated to sharing these wonderful artisanal produce to our fellow discerning gourmands. Limwood is honoured to be awarded “Top 10 Outstanding Wine & Spirits Importer / Distributor” by ProWine Singapore Awards 2024 (FHA - Food & Hotel Asia). Registered Company Name: Limwood Group Pte Ltd

Job Summary

Limwood is seeking a Delivery Driver to manage timely and accurate deliveries of Food & Beverage products (non-perishables) to B2B and B2C customers, ensuring proper handling and documentation.

Responsibilities

  • Collect goods from Limwood HQ at 128 Joo Seng Road, #05-02 Singapore 368356 during designated collection hours (12:00 to 15:00) to prepare for delivery.
  • Operate own van in good and clean condition to transport Food & Beverage products safely to customers.
  • Manage delivery schedules between 13:00 to 17:00 on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays, with occasional ad-hoc deliveries on other days.
  • Present Delivery Orders and obtain customer signatures to confirm receipt of goods and maintain accurate delivery documentation.
  • Use heavy-duty delivery trolley to load and unload products, ensuring safe handling and physical fitness to manage delivery tasks.
  • Coordinate with Limwood to receive delivery notifications by 15:00 the business day before scheduled deliveries.
  • Support deliveries for events and other business purposes as required.
  • Maintain vehicle cleanliness and handle all vehicle maintenance and operating costs independently.
  • Communicate effectively with Limwood team and customers to ensure smooth delivery operations.
  • Demonstrate responsibility and diligence in managing delivery tasks and schedules.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in delivering Food & Beverage products is a bonus but not required.
  • Delivery companies with their own fleet of drivers and vans are welcome to apply.
